{{Quote|Bogey 3856, check in. What have you seen? Bogey 3856, report.|Commander Faie|<ref name="HE" />}}
'''Bogey 3856''' was a [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]] and member of [[Bogey Squad]] during the [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|Great Jedi Purge]] on [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]. Under [[Clone Commander/Legends|Clone Commander]] [[Faie/Legends|Faie]], 3856 and his [[Squad/Legends|squad]] hunted down [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan Vos]] after he survived the initial [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]] attack. The lone clone trooper was beheaded by the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] while stalking him in a lake.

==Appearances==
*[[Republic 83|''Republic'' 83]] {{1st}}
